title: Unified Signal Schema
description: Every data source must be normalized to this schema before entering the CivicPulse pipeline.

location_pin.description: Ward ID or lat-long pair identifying the geographic area

intensity_score.description: Normalized distress intensity from 0.0 (no signal) to 1.0 (maximum distress)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the signal was observed

confidence.description: Confidence score of this signal from 0.0 (unreliable) to 1.0 (highly reliable)
